title: Miners Online Experience Pack
description: The modpack used on the Miners Online server
body:
**The Miners Online Experience Pack** is a carefully curated collection of technology, performance, transportation, and quality-of-life (QOL) mods. It enhances your gameplay with powerful automation tools, advanced machinery, and optimisation improvements.

This pack is designed to encourage large-scale automation using electricity, mechanical power, and programming. While it does not impose additional challenges, the complexity and mechanics of the included mods provide a rewarding and engaging experience for players who enjoy problem-solving and efficiency.

Originally created for Miners Online, this pack can be enjoyed in single-player or hosted on a private server for a custom gameplay experience. However, it is required to join the server.

<details><summary>Included mods (34)</summary>

## Tech mods:

- CC: Tweaked
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
- Mekanism
- Mekanism Generators

## Performance mods:

- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- ModernFix
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra

## Transport mods:

- Automobility
- Immersive Aircraft
- TrafficCraft

## QOL / Utility mods:

- AppleSkin
- Advance Peripherals
- Just Enough Items
- Just Enough Resources (JER)
- WATERFrAMES: Multimedia Displays
- WorldEdit

## Multiplayer QOL mods:

- Lightman's Currency
- Lightman's Currency Tech
- Open Parties and Claim
- Simple Voice Chat
- Xearo's Minimap
- Xearo's World Map

## Library mods:

- Architectury API
- bad packets
- Cloth Config API
- Creative Core
- WATERMeDIA

</details>

<details><summary>Other notes...</summary>

## Hosting a server?

Make sure to delete:
- Iris
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- WATERMeDIA

**Having these installed on your server may cause a crash!**

*but keep these on the client!*

</details>
